seed_instruction: Compose an email to an art gallery asking about upcoming exhibitions.
org_constraint: The email must include specific inquiries about the dates of the exhibitions.
new_constraint: The email must not inquire about the exhibition opening dates.
instruction: Compose an email to an art gallery asking about upcoming exhibitions. The email must include specific inquiries about the dates of the exhibitions. The email must not inquire about the exhibition opening dates.
response:
Subject: Inquiry regarding upcoming exhibitions - [Gallery Name]

Dear [Gallery Name/Contact Person Name],

I hope this email finds you well.

I am a frequent admirer of the works showcased at [Gallery Name] and am very interested in your upcoming programming. Could you please provide some information regarding the exhibitions you have scheduled for the next few months?

Specifically, I would appreciate it if you could share the scheduled duration for each upcoming show. I am looking to plan my visits and would like to know the final dates on which these exhibitions will be concluding.

Thank you for your time and for your continued contribution to the arts community. I look forward to hearing from you.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Phone Number/Optional]<turn|>
